focus_points.label: Addressing punctuality and meeting expectations
focus_points.reason: Notes mention they are always late. Could be time management issues, unclear priorities, or external factors — worth exploring the root cause.

focus_points.label: Current design priorities and focus areas
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard bi-weekly topic. Ensures alignment on what matters most in the current cycle.

focus_points.label: Team dynamics and collaboration flow
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — typical for a check-in. Understanding team interactions can reveal if lateness impacts team trust or cohesion.

focus_points.label: Support they need from you
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in hygiene. Opens the door to discussing any blockers or needs that might be causing delays.

focus_points.label: Current motivation and stress levels
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — routine wellbeing check. If lateness is stress-related, this can help identify contributing factors.
